name: Airport Management
description: Complete airport and aviation management — track flights, gates, passengers, runways, baggage, airlines, and crews with full airside and landside operations oversight.
author: AENEWS

capabilities.name: searchFlights
capabilities.description: Search for flights by number, airline, destination, or status

capabilities.name: createFlight
capabilities.description: Create a new flight schedule entry

capabilities.name: getPassenger
capabilities.description: Get passenger by ID with full travel details

capabilities.name: updateGate
capabilities.description: Update gate allocation, status, and availability

capabilities.name: deleteFlight
capabilities.description: Remove a flight from the airport system

capabilities.name: getRunway
capabilities.description: Get runway by ID with status and scheduling

capabilities.name: searchPassengers
capabilities.description: Search for passengers by name, booking reference, or flight

permissions.name: Read
permissions.description: Read airport data including flights, gates, and passengers

permissions.name: Write
permissions.description: Create/Update flights, gates, passengers, and airlines

permissions.name: Delete
permissions.description: Delete flights, passenger records, and gate assignments

permissions.name: Admin
permissions.description: Full airport administration including settings and user management
